title: Crowdstrike Holdings Stock Surges on Fears of Russian Cyberattacks
text: Shares of Crowdstrike Holdings surged Thursday (Feb. 24) as fears of Russian cyber mischief buoyed the stocks of internet security firms. Crowdstrike, of Austin, Texas, closed at $182.88, up $21.05 or 13%.

title: CrowdStrike's Annual Threat Report Reveals Uptick Around Ransomware and Disruptive Operations; Exposes Evolution of eCrime Ecosystem
text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWD), a leader in cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity and data, today announced the release of the 2022 CrowdStrike Global Threat Report, which details an 82% increase in ransomware-related data leaks, debuts two new adversaries – WOLF (Turkey) and OCELOT (Colombia) – and adds 21 new tracked adversaries across the globe.
